allowed_values: journal article, book chapter, book, thesis, working/discussion paper, conference paper, preprint, encyclopedia article

description: One or more authors of the work in inverted format. Multiple authors are separated by a semicolon (Last name a, First name a; Last name b, First name b).
allowed_values: Free text, inverted name format, semicolon-separated.

description: Title of the work in English. For works originally in English this is the original title; for works originally in other languages this is a translation produced during dataset curation.
example: Resisting amnesia: Yuyachkani performance and the postwar reconstruction of Peru

description: Title of the work in its original language. Null for works originally in English.
example: El Informe de la comisión de la verdad en Perú

description: Abstract or summary of the work in English. For works originally in other languages this is a translation produced during dataset curation. Null when the abstract was not available at source (2 records).
Abstract or summary of the work in its original language. Null for works originally in English.
Language of the original publication as an ISO 639-3 three-letter code.

Level-1 subject term manually assigned during curation from the UNBIS Thesaurus (https://metadata.un.org/thesaurus/), the controlled vocabulary of the United Nations Bibliographic Information System. Every record has at least one term.

Level-2 UNBIS Thesaurus subject term manually assigned during curation. Null if fewer than two terms were assigned. Note: subject terms are stored in wide format (one column per term level) for simplicity; records may have between one and four terms across columns unbis_concept through unbis_concept_4.
Level-3 UNBIS Thesaurus subject term manually assigned during curation. Null if fewer than three terms were assigned.
Level-4 UNBIS Thesaurus subject term manually assigned during curation. Null if fewer than four terms were assigned.
Digital Object Identifier of the work. Null when not available (common for books and theses). Values do not include the resolver prefix (https://doi.org/).
